metric.description: The Azure Monitor metric name to inspect for dimensions.

query.description: Optional substring filter for returned dimension names or dimension values.

label.description: Optional dimension name. Omit this to search dimension names for the metric; provide it to search values for this dimension.

limit.description: The maximum number of dimension names or values to return.

options.description: Provider-specific Azure metric label search options.

azure.description: Per-query Azure metrics label search options.

resource_id.description: Azure resource ID to list metric definitions from or query metric values for.

metrics_namespace.description: Azure metrics namespace. Required when searching values for a provided label on native Azure Monitor.
